button.name: action_dv_apply_standard_price_valuation_fix
button.invisible: not location_dest_id or (picking_type_code != 'outgoing' and not location_dest_id.scrap_location)

field.name: dv_fix_valuation_to_standard_price
field.invisible: not location_dest_id or (picking_type_code != 'outgoing' and not location_dest_id.scrap_location)
